title: Committed Step 1 patch: unified diff + bundled zip + 8 Tauri commands
public_claim: Red Team Phase II-A proper handoff is a file-level implementation packet with a unified diff, bundled zip, and eight Tauri commands.
distinctive_mechanism: It records Step 1 as file-level syntax-checked, includes command-registry work, and distinguishes handoff-done from cargo-check-verified implementation-done.
use_value: It matters because it gives implementation evidence while refusing to overclaim end-to-end verification.
